title: 仪表盘任务卡按稳定编号去重
requirements: Deduplicate dashboard task cards by stable task id before returning the read-only status model.
When a formal contract and its PROMOTED draft share an id, retain the formal contract and merge its runtime state; do not render the promoted draft as a second task.
Keep a draft visible when no formal contract with the same id exists, and preserve existing corrupt/missing JSON degradation and path-boundary behavior.
Add deterministic tests covering formal-plus-promoted-draft precedence, draft-only visibility, runtime merge, and the absence of duplicate ids.
Do not modify task contracts, drafts, runtime files, dependency manifests, lockfiles, or project status data. Do not add dependencies or change the dashboard's read-only behavior.
